title: Create: Tramways
description: Create: Tramways adds a bunch of tram-related features such as Speed Limit Signs and TTS Announcements.
body:
Create: Tramways

Create: Tramways adds a bunch of tram-related features. These features mainly relate to signalling and signage used on UK tramways and railways. **Warning:** This mod probably contains a lot of bugs, so backups are a good idea. If you do find a bug, please report it! ## Features - Tram Signal - shows signal (or Steam 'n' Rails switch) state - Tram and Railway Sign - speed limits and more for automatic trains - Speaker - TTS on-board and station announcements - Request Stops - only stop at a station on request - Station Name Signs - with many sign variants ---

a Purple Create mod
